findings.message: Seed data bypasses create_item_normalized() normalization when creating Item records. Seeds inject raw names directly without stripping/lowercasing, creating inconsistent data provenance across writes.
findings.suggestion: Import create_item_normalized() and use it instead of direct Item() construction, or apply normalization before creating: normalized = row['name'].strip().lower(); session.add(Item(name=normalized))

findings.message: Test setup uses create_item() without normalization when testing the GET endpoint, creating test data inconsistent with POST endpoint behavior which uses create_item_normalized().
findings.suggestion: For consistency, import and use create_item_normalized() in test setup: create_item_normalized(db_session, 'alpha')
